title: Golden Foods!
description: In the style of Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples, this mod incorporates different gold-dipped vanilla foods, as well as enchanted gold versions.
body:
![GOLDEN FOODS! BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/bf221e39c48b7283d932655dcff56095231fe900.webp) In the style of Golden Apples and Enchanted Golden Apples, this mod incorporates different gold-dipped vanilla foods, as well as enchanted gold versions. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![GOLDEN FOODS! SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/0077a3440544d4e7bfcd05a1322fa2d304d646c8.webp) This mod adds golden and enchanted golden variants of the default foods. All foods will give the same effects as golden apples and enchanted golden apples. As for the golden carrots, the manufacturing method has been changed so that they require gold bars. All golden foods need gold bars to obtain, and in the case of enchanted golden foods, these can be obtained by getting a new enchantment "Golden Food Enchantment", which can be obtained with 30 levels of experience at a table of default enchantments. ![GOLDEN FOODS! F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/0135c7b749eac86e30b62435d7c47e75d3bea9fb.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that add food? No, for now it is only compatible with "vanilla" foods. In any case, we plan to make the mod compatible with other types of food added by major food mods. It is not our priority, but you can leave suggestions in the comments. ### How can I get the enchanted variants? They can only be obtained by previously obtaining a new enchantment, which to obtain it, it is essential to have level 30 experience, and with some luck to obtain it on the enchantment table, as long as you place a book. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![GOLDEN FOODS! SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/cd346f841fa3f1207f5a20ce1779396a49dca742.webp) ![GOLDEN FOODS! IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/7c938ed41eb4a51496848ebb374b6411c3b3906d.png) ![GOLDEN FOODS! IMAGE 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zUg53pQP/images/7c938ed41eb4a51496848ebb374b6411c3b3906d.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
